name: sarasche
purpose: make khakhra snackable and healthier than chips
audience: Gen Z chip lovers, office desk snackers, health-aware snackers, urban Indian families

research.summary: Saras Che is a Bengaluru-run better-for-you Indian snack brand focused on roasted, not fried coin khakhra and related crunchy snacks. The brand stands for guilt-free snacking with real spices, whole wheat, no palm oil, and a clean, light, crunchy, playful personality aimed at Gen Z chip lovers, office snackers, health-aware consumers, and urban Indian families.
research.aesthetic: Clean, bright, natural-light product photography with airy beige and earthy backdrops, crisp close-ups that show crunch and roasted texture, minimal ingredient styling with real spices and grains, and playful snack arrangements for office desks, on-the-go moments, and modern urban family snacking.
